name: Propagation: Caro
descriptionTemplate:
When Saya is in the team, the {Caro} Realm mutates into Propagation: {Caro}.

{Embryo Fusion}: The {Embryo Fusion} gained per turn increases to 50~100, scaling with HP lost. The {Embryo Fusion} cap increases from 100 to 200. Upon reaching the cap, generate a {Propagule Embryo}.

{Propagule Embryo}: Playing this card no longer grants Crit. Rate. {Devour} no longer grants Shield or Temporary {STR}. The first time each Awakener consumes a {Propagule Embryo} each turn, they gain 40 stacks of {Propagation Frenzy}: Each stack enhances the following effects of that Awakener's next Exalt this turn by 1%: Final DMG, {STR}/{Tentacle DMG} Generation, Fixed {Poison}, Fixed {Counter}, Fixed Shield, Fixed HP Recovery, and {STR⯆}.

{Crimson Furnace}: The auto-accumulation at the start of each turn changes to 10% of HP lost, up to 50% of Max HP. No longer accumulates at the end of battle. 3-turn cooldown upon use.

Crimson Corrosion: After using {Crimson Furnace}, inflict {Corrosion} on all enemies equal to 1% of their Max HP. The more {Crimson Furnace} consumed, the stronger the {Corrosion} effect, up to +100%. Deals 5× {Corrosion} effect against "Empty Shell" enemies.

At the start of exploration, Max HP +10%, team DMG Amplification +50%, and all Awakeners gain 20 stacks of {Propagation Frenzy} at the start of each turn. If the team consists only of {Caro} or {Chaos} Awakeners, the DMG Amplification granted by this effect is doubled.

Realm Mastery becomes {Propagation: Caro Mastery}: Each point of Realm Mastery increases the {Propagation Frenzy} stacks gained from "Propagation: {Caro}" by 0.05%.

If the team consists only of {Caro} or {Chaos} Awakeners, the {Propagation: Caro Mastery} effect is doubled.
